text: Data parallelism trains replicas of a model on different mini-batches and synchronizes gradients across workers.
explanation: It is the standard way to scale training across multiple GPUs or machines.
usage: Key in large-scale deep learning and distributed training pipelines.
spanish: El paralelismo de datos entrena réplicas del modelo en mini-batches diferentes y sincroniza gradientes entre workers.

text: Model parallelism splits layers or parameters across devices when a single model is too large for one GPU.
explanation: It is essential for very large transformer and diffusion models.
usage: Used for trillion-parameter or frontier-scale training runs.
spanish: El paralelismo de modelo divide capas o parámetros entre dispositivos cuando un modelo es demasiado grande para una GPU.

text: Gradient accumulation simulates a larger batch by accumulating gradients across several smaller steps.
explanation: It reduces memory pressure while preserving the effective batch size.
usage: Common in large language model fine-tuning and low-memory settings.
spanish: La acumulación de gradientes simula un batch mayor acumulando gradientes a través de varios pasos pequeños.

text: Mixed precision training uses lower-precision arithmetic to improve throughput and reduce memory cost.
explanation: It is now standard in modern GPU training stacks.
usage: Widely used in transformer pretraining and large-scale inference preparation.
spanish: El entrenamiento con precisión mixta usa aritmética de menor precisión para mejorar throughput y reducir costo de memoria.

text: Gradient checkpointing trades extra computation for reduced memory during backpropagation.
explanation: It helps fit larger models when memory is the binding constraint.
usage: Important for deep networks and long-context LLM training.
spanish: El checkpointing de gradientes intercambia cómputo extra por menos memoria durante backpropagation.

text: Learning rate schedules adapt the step size over time to improve convergence and stability.
explanation: Proper scheduling can be as important as the optimizer itself.
usage: Fundamental in optimization for deep learning and RL.
spanish: Los schedules de learning rate adaptan el tamaño del paso con el tiempo para mejorar convergencia y estabilidad.
